overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open-world game showing a cowboy character walking through a rocky mountain trail. The scene features overcast lighting, wet ground surfaces, and large boulder formations as the character progresses from an open area into a narrow rocky corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky mountain approach with scattered boulders and pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wide rocky dirt path toward a narrow mountain passage ahead

entered.detail: massive gray rock outcrop with steep faces on the left side of the trail
steep rocky slope with loose stones forming the right boundary of the valley
cluster of evergreen trees visible in the distance against the overcast sky
uneven dirt trail mixed with stones and patches of wet mud

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open mountain valley with large boulder formations on the left and a rocky slope rising on the right. The overcast sky casts diffuse light over the wet, uneven dirt path as the character approaches a narrow passage between the rocks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky corridor between steep boulder walls

events.description: path narrows significantly as character enters confined rocky corridor with steep walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the narrow rocky passage with the steep rock wall now close on the right

entered.detail: vertical rock face appearing on the left as the path narrows

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a narrow rocky corridor where the mountainside on the right becomes a steep wall close to the path. The large boulder formation on the left falls behind as the character moves deeper into the confined mountain passage, with distant pine trees now visible only to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open mountain valley that gradually tightens into a confined rocky corridor. It begins with the character traversing a wet, uneven dirt path flanked by large boulder formations and a rising slope under a diffuse, overcast sky. As the character advances, the open valley narrows, and the mountainside on the right transforms into a steep, imposing wall that closes in on the path. The scene then shifts as the initial boulders fall behind, leaving only distant pine trees visible to the left while the camera moves deeper into the restrictive mountain passage.
